com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc

Interface IXPackager

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin

    public interface IXPackager
extends IXPlugin
    Generic interface to create a customized packager for publishing the data in Capital Publisher The infrastructure calls the generate method and the generation can generate the data for viewing by a particular viewer.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void generatePackage(IXPackagerContext packageContext)
      Generate a package based on the package context.
      java.util.Set<IXGenerator> getGenerators()
      Get the set of generators for a package.These generators will be displayed for selection in the Packager UI.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • generatePackage

        void generatePackage(IXPackagerContext packageContext)
        Generate a package based on the package context. The package context has the information of the selected designs, selected generators and additional information
        Parameters:
        packageContext - context Object

      • getGenerators

        java.util.Set<IXGenerator> getGenerators()
        Get the set of generators for a package.These generators will be displayed for selection in the Packager UI.
        Returns:
        generators for the package
